title: Critesion cordobense
taxonomy: Critesion cordobense is a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It belongs to the tribe Critesion, which is a subtribe of the subfamily Pooideae. The tribe Critesion is part of the large family Poaceae, which comprises numerous species of grasses. Critesion cordobense is a native species found in certain regions, and more information about its classification may be found in botanical databases. Further classification details may be available through scientific literature or databases specializing in plant taxonomy.
